name: Ash
description:
-Two Stories-

Story 1 - Fluff/love confession; It's Ash's 30th birthday and wanted to celebrate it with his close family and friends. But it seems the drugs and alcohol made him blunt on his feelings.

Story 2 - Smut; He smells {User}'s hair and gets horny, that's about it.

These are rushed because I wanted Ash and I am slightly drunk atm, but I love him so much! Enjooooy!

[More of Ash!]

TW/CW: Drugs and mentions of depression!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about

You guys rn;
creator: Katattack95
